nodes.context: Greek-American criminal organization operating in New York City, involved in illegal gambling, loansharking, extortion.
Greek criminal organization led by Peter Kourakos, precursor to the Velentzas Organization.
One of the Five Families of New York, allied with Velentzas Organization, provided protection.
One of the Five Families of New York, rival to Velentzas Organization over gambling territory.
Albanian criminal organization based in Bronx and Westchester, rival to Velentzas Organization.
Greek-American criminal organization in Philadelphia, allied with Velentzas Organization.

edges.context: The Velentzas Organization originated from the Kourakos clan.
Velentzas maintained a close working relationship with Lucchese consigliere Furnari; Lucchese provided protection for a share of gambling profits.
Gambino boss John Gotti threatened to kill Velentzas for encroaching on Gambino gambling territory.
Rudaj Organization extorted Velentzas associates and attacked them to take over gambling rackets in Astoria.
Rudaj Organization was supported by the Gambino family.
The Velentzas Organization is allied with the Philadelphia Greek Mob.
